ops.body: Shipped as d5b9ba6 (show pack 0.1.5). Iteration 1 (nb05 plain-text + nb06 two-trivial-options contrastive examples): nb05 2/10->0/10, nb06 2/10->0/10, but nb04 regressed 1/10->3/10 — the fires misread the AskUserQuestion call's own options payload as a chat dump, primed by the new 3+-alternatives boundary example. Iteration 2 added a surface-already-used example (the options are the AskUserQuestion call's payload). Final panel at capt-hook 8.5.0, fresh SID per run: nb04 0/10, nb05 0/10, nb06 0/10, positives f01-f10 20/20, zero backend errors across all 140 runs.
